title: Transferring Workflows Across Different Monday.com Accounts
excerpt: I would like to request a feature that allows users to transfer workflows from one Monday.com account to another. Currently, there is no easy way to duplicate or migrate workflows, which creates significant manual effort…

posts.author: SamCrowder (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to request a feature that allows users to transfer workflows from one Monday.com account to another. Currently, there is no easy way to duplicate or migrate workflows, which creates significant manual effort when trying to move workflows across different accounts or workspaces.

Being able to copy workflows, including their triggers, actions, and integrations, between accounts would save time and ensure consistency in processes across accounts.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sam,

Creating a monday.com app and a Workspace Template feature this should be possible. However this will copy the whole workspace that is configured in the feature. But then again, this might be relevant as well as a workflow and its configuration is super tight to the board(s) selected in the trigger/actions. So copying the workflow without the board(s) would require a complete reconfiguration of the workflow itself.

Hope this helps.

Best,

Maarten
